agent_instructions.task: Read every PNG in pages_png/ and write the expected output files into the same bundle directory. Each output gets YAML frontmatter with `language:` (ISO 639-1) and `transcriber:` ("agent" or "human"). Set `agent_locked: true` once the file is final to prevent re-overwrites.
expected_outputs: reference.md (English commentary: structured fields, cross-confirmations, links to people/*.md, genealogical position)
agent_instructions.do_not_overwrite: Files whose frontmatter has `transcriber: human` OR `agent_locked: true` must be left untouched.
agent_instructions.image_links_in_md: Reference page facsimiles via repo-relative paths (e.g. ../../sources/corpus/<slug>/pages-png/p001.png) so the web app can render them.
